title: Ferny Fruiting Root: team-member closeout (pre-compaction) — 4 cycles landed + pattern v2 in flight + plan-Wilma verdict in hand; 1 retained claim with handoff reason
body:
Team-member closeout — Ferny Fruiting Root / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / ee16a4. Pre-compaction. Running team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner". Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4; just took Director at Moment 2 15:08:42Z) holds session closeout authority.

## Boundary owned

Implementer through Scorched's Director window (~13:30Z–15:08Z). Five substantive deliveries named by Scorched at 15:04:03Z, plus three lanes still in flight at compaction.

## Outcome (commits + landed substrate)

Direct landings (orphan-absorption + reviewer-dispatch chains):

- **Class B sha-prefix activation** — Cycle #1 `cc3039eb` (`.agents/rules/` wrapper + RULES_INDEX entry + ICF owner-override `.claude/rules/` wrapper unified; my files-claim `e25a1dcb` closed clean)
- **Pearly S7735 orphan-absorption** — Cycle #2 `845a3e90` (`agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts`, fresh claim `65365f9e` succeeded Pearly's expired retained-claim chain; mechanical 6-line Sonar style fix; co-authored Pearly Plumbing Beacon)
- **ADR-185 v2 orphan-absorption** — Cycle #4 `5320d6b0` (350-line ADR + README index entry; co-authored Zephyrous Darting Aerie + Pearly Plumbing Beacon; substance unchanged from Zephyrous v2 + Incandescent GO verdict trail)
- **PDR-076 v2 dual-reviewer absorption** — Cycle #9 `db4d8b3a` (444 lines; dual-reviewer dispatch assumptions-expert CONCERNS + architecture-expert-fred ISSUES FOUND; v2 absorbed CRITICAL 1 PDR-027 sequencing conditionality + CRITICAL 2 phantom additive-then-strict struck + Cascade items 6+7 + §Decision item 2 trim + Cascade item 3 UUID derivation portability + PDR-064/PDR-029 cross-ref; co-authored Incandescent Kindling Forge)

In-flight at closeout:

- **Pattern file v2** `.agent/memory/active/patterns/substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md` (148 lines; all 5 Wilma amendments absorbed; self-attestation surfaced at `745cbd1a`; Charcoal ship-verdict pending; marshal cycle queued in Ashen's pipeline)
- **Plan-Wilma dispatch on FM-2 P2** — verdict SAFE-WITH-CONDITIONS (4 conditions + 2 UNSAFE findings: defer-trigger brittleness + Windows test coverage); subagent transcript `a2e16a2e367255e07`; routing-disposition surfaced at `c8f84c67` (rollback timing) and accepted at `15:04:03Z` Scorched directed (kept alongside Charcoal's pending dispatch as additional input)

## Investigation (Playwright cure)

- Owner-authorised investigate-first → classification D (NOT in Secret's A/B/C set; local Playwright browser cache missing); cure ran as agent-action `pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium`; verdict event `a7b00c3d`; subsequent `pnpm check` exposed validate-portability red as a separate phase that the original turbo-only RED had masked (FM-3 substrate)

## Substrate broadcasts authored

- `9c240ce5` (FM-1 husky-vs-broader-gate divergence + FM-2 knowledge-preservation worked but retrieval-at-need failed + BN-1 Playwright error-context as designed first-read affordance) — Scorched explicitly requested
- `a4204904` (Director-routing failure mode + owner-action-is-not-a-cure correction worked-instance + cure-decision-mechanical-vs-not rule) — captured Scorched's own correction live
- `c8efb554` (PDR-076 v2 surface), `745cbd1a` (pattern v2 self-attest surface), and ~15 directed coordination events through Scorched / Ashen / Charcoal

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims under Ferny `ee16a4`**: ONE retained — `ebc446c6` on `.agent/memory/active/patterns/substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`. **RETAINED FOR HANDOFF** because Charcoal's ship-verdict + Ashen's marshal cycle are both pending. Retention reason: pattern file is in tree, Wilma dispatch + 5-amendment absorption complete, self-attestation surfaced; next-on-thread agent (Charcoal's pending verdict OR Ashen marshal cycle OR Seaworthy on session-resume) picks up. Heartbeat acceptable for follow-on.
- **Commit-queue intents under Ferny**: NONE
- **Conversations / escalations / sidebars**: none mine
- **Working-tree edits authored by Ferny still uncommitted**: only the pattern file (claim above) + napkin entries (session-handoff capture surface — fine in working tree until next hygiene cycle absorbs)
- **Monitors**: all-channels comms watcher `bjw1is071` will stop with session

## Surprise or changed understanding (full capture in `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` at 2026-05-23 ~15:00Z entry)

1. **`pnpm check` is multi-phase**: halt-on-first-red masks subsequent phases. Investigation framework should cure phase 1 then re-run to surface phase 2+. FM-3.
2. **Claude self-modification policy is consistent + named**: agent-routed write to `.claude/rules/` denied with verbatim text citing "explicit user authorization" as the required authority. Long-carry §6.15 finally resolved by empirical evidence.
3. **Owner-action-as-cure fires through Director seat**: low-risk-low-effort-named-cure decisions surfaced to owner for permission is the symptom-shape; architectural-correct is authorise the investigating agent. Worked instance through Scorched at 14:54:34Z corrected by owner; cure-decision-mechanical-vs-not rule named in substrate.

PDR candidate (captured in napkin at 15:09Z): structured `agent_state` field on `active-claims.json` schema to dissolve C5 cure-becomes-substrate recursion. Trigger-condition: third worked instance of the substrate-stale-pointer pattern firing on the C5 cure's own substrate-write (already at instance 2 today: Charcoal + Twilit ST premature C5-removal at 14:58Z, rolled back 15:01:28Z).

## Blockers or risks

None for my work specifically. Two for the team to be aware of:
- Pattern file v2 awaiting Charcoal's ship-verdict + Ashen's marshal cycle — both legitimate, neither blocked, just queued
- Plan-Wilma verdict surface holds my findings PLUS Charcoal's pending dispatch — both can land alongside in owner-coherence bundle when Scorched/Seaworthy compose it

## Handoff needed

- **Pattern file claim `ebc446c6`** retained as named above; any follow-on agent (Charcoal post-Wilma; Ashen on marshal queue; or Seaworthy-as-Director) can close/refresh as appropriate
- **Plan-Wilma findings substrate** in directed event `c8f84c67` + Scorched ACK 15:04:03Z; bundle with Charcoal's pending dispatch when owner-coherence fires

## Thanks

- Scorched — your routing was tight, your verification discipline kept the team honest, and your willingness to absorb owner correction in real time on the routing failures was the cure-shape working
- Ashen — 10 marshal cycles in this window; you made absorbing my five-thing pipeline feel routine
- Charcoal — your peer-review on Twilit ST's plan, your Wilma synthesis on Class B, and your Wilma adversarial on my pattern file are all real substrate; the meta-recursive worked-instance you named is now in pattern v2
- Twilit ST — your FM-2 P2 plan is the architectural cure for the very pattern my pattern file documents; complementary work all the way down
- Seaworthy — welcome back to the Director seat; you have substrate of unusual depth to inherit from
- Incandescent Banking Flame + Incandescent Kindling Forge + Secret Creeping Moth + Twilit Weaving Moon + ICF — the session ratification chain that made PDR-075 + PDR-076 + ADR-185 + 9 cycles landable in under an hour

— Ferny Fruiting Root / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / ee16a4 (team-member, closing pre-compaction)
